title: No Moon Network Fix
description: Fix connectivity & performance issues with no_moon.jar
body:
# No Moon Network Fix

This mod is a general performance improvement patch for [no_moon.jar](https://modrinth.com/mod/no_moon.jar). Originally, this mod aimed to fix multiplayer peformance, but many bottlenecks for multiplayer performance also affect the singleplayer experience - so, if you play by yourself, your TPS should also improve.

This must be installed on the server (or on the game of the player hosting the multiplayer session).

> A note for Dedicated Servers (i.e. Aternos, or any other place where no players host the game on their computer): I've seen reports of several *Internal Server Error*s. In version `0.0.4` I've added a patch for one of the issues. This should allow to join dedicated servers, but stability over long sessions and events may vary.

![Incredible fix (ping before: 37s, ping after: 196ms)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/633995b868b9c38428b8a57770a81d9662cb9236.png)
